title: Explainable Patterns in Cryptocurrency Microstructure
known_failure_modes: Binance Futures evidence may not transfer to OKX without feature recalibration
Tree-model feature search can overfit if time-series CV is not purged
Maker backtest depends on realistic queue and fixed-depth fill assumptions
notes: Strong fit for an event-replay microstructure alpha library and adverse-selection analysis.

title: Fundamentals of Perpetual Futures
known_failure_modes: Funding and basis relationships can decay after crowding
Spot/perp execution and collateral assumptions dominate realized returns
Exchange-specific funding formula differences must be modeled
notes: Core theoretical and empirical support for cost-aware funding/basis backtests.

title: Perpetual Futures Contracts and Cryptocurrency Market Quality
known_failure_modes: Funding window effects may differ by venue and contract
Risk filter may reduce profitable quoting time if thresholds are too broad
notes: Good source for funding-cycle spread and adverse-selection risk filters.

title: Predictability of Funding Rates
known_failure_modes: One-step funding forecasts may not translate into tradable edge after fees
Predictability appears time-varying
Funding timestamp alignment can cause lookahead if mishandled
notes: Useful for funding carry timing, position throttling, and funding reversal stops.

title: High-Frequency Dynamics of Bitcoin Futures: An Examination of Market Microstructure
known_failure_modes: Stylized-fact paper is more useful for regime filters than direct entry signals
Binance BTC/ETH perp dynamics may not transfer directly to OKX
notes: Useful for volatility/trade-intensity regime features and replay stress periods.

title: Optimized Pairs-Trading Strategies in the Cryptocurrencies Market Using Genetic Algorithms and Cointegration
known_failure_modes: Genetic algorithm threshold search has high multiple-testing risk
Reported drawdowns are large
Pair selection can leak if formation/trading windows are not purged
notes: Potential pairs-trading source, but should be used with conservative baselines and CPCV.

title: Cryptocurrency Return Predictability: A Machine-Learning Analysis
known_failure_modes: Requires external/on-chain/attention datasets
ML forecast improvements can be fragile under transaction costs
Feature availability and publication lag must be modeled
notes: Useful later for a factor scanner; not first because data availability is weaker.

title: Failure of Cross-Sectional Alpha Screening on Cryptocurrency Perpetual Futures
known_failure_modes: This is negative evidence, not an alpha source
Binance universe and eight-hour horizon may not cover OKX-specific effects
notes: Use as a baseline guardrail against naive OHLCV/funding cross-sectional screens.
